title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises
jsonLd.description:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is actively seeking a talented and motivated Production Engineer to join our dynamic team in Srinagar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises:
H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in TPM
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Learning & development budget
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Srinagar, Jammu & Kashmir, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with H.B. Fuller India International Enterprises!
